<!--
Thanks for contributing to octoscope! Please skim CONTRIBUTING.md and
fill in the sections below. Keep PRs focused — one logical change.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue with #N. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark the relevant Conventional Commit type(s). -->

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `refactor` / `perf` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` / `chore` / `test`

## Checklist

- [ ] Built locally (`make build`) and ran the app
- [ ] `gofmt -w .` clean and `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes (added/updated tests where it makes sense)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Keeps octoscope **read-only** (no GitHub-state mutations) and
      public-GitHub only — or explains why an exception is warranted

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Screenshots for UI changes, trade-offs, anything worth flagging. -->
